name: House Medic
description: Tends to injuries and illness within the house. Reduces health recovery time.
dailyEffect: Deployed medics restore health daily to the most injured roster member.
synergyNote: High medicine skill (>45) heals more each day (8→12 health).

name: House Steward
description: Manages the day-to-day accounts and provisioning. Reduces waste and overhead.
dailyEffect: Manages the accounts. +15 Marks per day.
synergyNote: High administration skill (>45) increases daily income (15→25 Marks).

name: House Trainer
description: Maintains discipline and readiness among the roster.
dailyEffect: Runs drills. Idle roster members gain skill points over time.
synergyNote: High melee skill (≥70) trains two roster members per day instead of one.

name: Quartermaster
description: Oversees equipment maintenance and inventory distribution.
synergyNote: Manages supply and logistics for passive income (3–8 Marks/day, scaled by logistics skill).

name: Chief Engineer
description: Manages structural repairs and technical projects for the house.
dailyEffect: Oversees workshop output. Reduces material costs on district projects.
synergyNote: High engineering skill (>50) increases material output (5→10+ per day).

name: House Scout
description: Reads the city for threats before they arrive. Keeps the house informed and the streets quieter.
dailyEffect: Reduces district tension by 3 in the current district each day.
synergyNote: High survival skill (>55) reduces tension by 5 per day.

name: Procurement Officer
description: Sources goods through unofficial channels. Knows which hands to grease and which to avoid.
dailyEffect: Brings in 5–10 Marks per day from off-register procurement.
synergyNote: High intrigue skill (>55) increases daily earnings (5→10 Marks).

name: House Archivist
description: Catalogues information and tracks the city's open secrets. Rumors find the house faster.
dailyEffect: Boosts the heat of one active rumor each day, accelerating its spread.
synergyNote: High academics skill (>60) boosts two rumors per day instead of one.

name: House Warden
description: Maintains order within the house walls and manages those in the house's custody.
dailyEffect: Improves the condition of captive roster members by 1 step every 5 days.
synergyNote: High security skill (>60) halves the recovery interval (every 3 days instead of 5).

name: House Factor
description: Works the house's debts and obligations. Turns obligations into opportunities when given time.
dailyEffect: Reduces house debt by 2–5 Marks per day through renegotiated terms.
synergyNote: High negotiation skill (>60) increases daily debt reduction (2→5 Marks).
